subject: Add null checks for pinterface coming from openstack
commit_message:
Add null checks for pinterface coming from openstack

Issue-ID: SO-1484

Signed-off-by: Munir Ahmad <munir.ahmad@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I7da64f0d4a08d3cd7c60abdd525b0ecde79bf5b7
